checks.name: hosted_adapter_hostile_contract
checks.run:
import subprocess,sys
result=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-m','pytest','-q','tests/test_hosted_adapter.py'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=120,check=False); assert result.returncode==0,result.stdout+result.stderr; assert ' passed' in result.stdout
print('HOSTED_ADAPTER_CHALLENGED')

checks.name: hosted_postgres_and_outbox_contract
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
storage=Path('factoryline/hosted_storage.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); api=Path('factoryline/hosted_api.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert storage.count('FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY')==3; assert 'FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED' in storage; markers=['POSTGRES_RLS_BOUND','HOSTED_INGRESS_TRANSACTIONAL','HOSTED_DECISION_TRANSACTIONAL','CHECK_OUTBOX_TRANSACTIONAL','GITHUB_APP_PUBLICATION_BOUND','OUTBOX_FAILURE_RETAINED','OUTBOX_PUBLISHED']; assert all(marker in storage for marker in markers); assert all(route in api for route in ['/healthz','/readyz','github','approvals']) or 'healthz' in api and 'readyz' in api
